name: Shanghai Weihong Electronic Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Weihong Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. provides motion control system solutions in China and internationally. It offers control cards; integrated and handheld CNC systems; servo drivers; and CNC accessories, including manual pulse generators and tool sensors. The company sells its CNC controllers for machine tool manufacturers. Its products are used in various industries, such as machining centers, laser and waterjet cutting, engraving and milling, mold making, advertising, glass and stone machining, etc. Shanghai Weihong Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
